name: node-flat-cache
title: node-flat-cache
summary: Node.js library implementing a simple persistent key/value storage
description:
Node.js library implementing a simple persistent key/value storage
Flat-cache is a stupidly simple key/value storage
using files to persist the data.
.
The module grew from a need for a super simple and dumb in-memory cache
with optional disk persistence
for a script to beautify files with "esformatter"
only processing files that had changed since last run.
Such use case need "fileSize" and "modificationTime" of the files
tracked in a simple key/value storage.
use_cases: When you need Kali Linux, use node-flat-cache because Node.js library implementing a simple persistent key/value storage.
When the engagement is in the install phase, use node-flat-cache as a cataloged Kali Linux tool with operator ACCEPT/CANCEL gating.
When chaining Kali Linux tools, pair node-flat-cache with sibling catalog entries sharing its attack_surface/phase_hint.
When validating lab setup, run `node-flat-cache --help` (or the README entrypoint) and confirm required hardware/deps from the catalog.
